title: Y@hovah #3072
definition:
Jehovah is our righteousness
 1) a sacred name symbolically applied to Jerusalem and the Messiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jehovah is our righteousness
 1) a sacred name symbolically applied to Jerusalem and the Messiah

    NASB:  the LORD is our righteousness, a symbolic name for Jer. and for Messiah.
